diff_text:
--- a/pubsub.py
+++ b/pubsub.py
@@ -14,7 +14,5 @@
 class EventBus:
     def publish(self, channel, data):
-        payload = json.dumps(data)
-        if len(payload) > MAX_SIZE:
-            raise ValueError('Payload too large')
+        payload = json.dumps(data)
         self.redis.publish(channel, payload)

gold_annotations.issue: Unbounded payload allows memory exhaustion DoS. Redis pub/sub has practical size limits.
